use_cases: Displaying restaurant menu items with images, prices, and vegetarian indicators
Food delivery app product listings with add-to-cart functionality
E-commerce product cards with hover animations and discount pricing display
ai_summary: A restaurant menu item card component featuring food imagery with gradient overlay, pricing with savings display, vegetarian indicator with animated icon, prep time, and an add-to-cart button. Built with Framer Motion for smooth hover scale animations and tap feedback, styled with Tailwind CSS using a flat minimalist aesthetic with rounded corners and subtle shadows. Perfect for food delivery apps and restaurant ordering interfaces.
